lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the exterior or interior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition. Both the interior and exterior show significant wear and damage. The mechanical and electrical systems require repairs or substantial maintenance to be fully functional.
Mint condition.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle in absolute mint condition! It looks and drives like it's fresh off the showroom floor, having been meticulously cared for to maintain its flawless appearance and performance. From its pristine interior to its gleaming exterior, this is a rare opportunity to own a car that has been kept in top-tier shape. Ready for its next proud owner!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly showroom quality. The exterior paint is flawless, with no scratches, stone chips, or dings to be found. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery shows no signs of wear, and all electronic features and climate controls function exactly as they did the day it was manufactured. Mechanically, it has been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and performs flawlessly. This car has been garage-kept and represents the highest possible standard for a pre-owned vehicle. Prospective buyers can expect a car that looks and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable option for daily commuting. The exterior shows its age with some visible paint fading on the hood and minor scratches along the passenger side door. Inside, the cabin is clean but displays typical wear on the driver's seat and some light staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car is functional and drives well; however, the engine has a minor oil leak that will need monitoring, and the suspension is beginning to feel a bit soft over bumps. The air conditioning and heat are fully operational, and the tires still have a decent amount of tread left. It is a solid, honest car that performs as expected for its age and mileage without any immediate major repairs required.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber pre-owned investment that performs with distinction.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's looking for a brand new home. It’s been super reliable for me and is still in really solid shape, perfect for your daily commute or weekend adventures! It runs great and has been truly well-loved. I'm sad to see it go, but I know you'll enjoy it just as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

Available is a mechanically sound E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six mated to a precise 6-speed manual transmission. This driver-spec example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a documented VANOS refresh and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity. The powertrain remains exceptionally responsive, benefiting from factory individual throttle bodies and a limited-slip differential that maintains optimal torque distribution. Clean title. Mechanically sound. Minor interior wear. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor signs of careful road use, while the interior features supple upholstery and a clean, smoke-free cabin. Mechanically, it is sound; the engine pulls strongly, the transmission shifts smoothly, and all electronic features function as intended. It has a comprehensive service history, including recent fluid changes and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it is ready for its next owner. This is a reliable, well-cared-for example that offers a premium driving experience and long-term value.

This impeccably maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking a synthesis of performance and reliability. Demonstrating a consistent history of professional servicing, the automobile remains in commendable condition, with both mechanical systems and interior appointments reflecting a high standard of stewardship. We invite you to experience a motorcar that balances enduring value with an authoritative presence on the road.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated to meet rigorous standards of performance and aesthetic integrity. Demonstrating consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved interior, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning professional. This unit represents a superior value proposition, balancing proven durability with sophisticated styling.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride and it has been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great on the road. Everything runs smoothly and it's super comfortable for those long weekend trips. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make the next owner very happy! Feel free to reach out if you want to come take it for a spin.

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission engages with mechanical precision, paired with a factory variable M-differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction
Well-maintained vehicle. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of daily reliability and refined performance. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though minor stone chips and light surface marks consistent with careful road use can be found upon close inspection. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery shows only modest signs of wear on the driver’s side bolster, and all onboard electronics—including the high-fidelity sound system and dual-zone climate control—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a documented service history and recent fluid service. The engine delivers smooth, consistent power, while the transmission shifts seamlessly through every gear. The suspension remains tight and responsive, providing a comfortable ride without any unusual noises. This is a solid, well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence. Includes two sets of keys and the original owner's manuals.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver who prioritizes both mechanical integrity and sophisticated presentation. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating a consistent history of professional care, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by robust performance and a well-appointed interior. We invite you to inspect this exemplary model, which stands as a testament to balanced value and enduring quality within its class.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and passenger comfort. Offering an optimal balance of performance and value, this selection represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who prioritizes reliability and sustained quality.

Hey there! Thanks for stopping by to check out my car! I’ve absolutely loved driving this beauty—it’s been super reliable and is still in really wonderful shape. It runs like a dream and has plenty of life left in it for its next owner. If you’re looking for a solid, well-cared-for ride that’s ready for your next road trip, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions at all—I'd love to help you get behind the wheel!

Offered is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant. This high-revving inline-six utilizes individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear power band peaking at an 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains taut with a factory-spec limited-slip differential and reinforced rear subframe mounts to ensure structural integrity under lateral load. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive cooling system overhaul and valve clearance
Good condition. Routine maintenance completed. Clean title. All systems functional.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and presents beautifully. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish with only minor, negligible stone chips consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the interior is exceptionally clean and odor-free; the leather seats remain supportive with very light wear, and all technological features—from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system—operate exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and the transmission shifts seamlessly. We have followed a rigorous maintenance schedule, with a recent oil change and a full brake inspection just completed. It offers a smooth, confident ride and is ready for its next owner with no immediate service needs. Full maintenance logs are available for your review.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Boasting a documented service history and consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience and dependable performance. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for road-readiness and long-term value.
